name: DatePicker
description: DatePicker is a form component to work with dates.

props.name: modelValue
props.type: Date | Array<Date> | Array<Date | null> | undefined | null
props.description: Value of the component.

props.name: defaultValue
props.type: Date | Array<Date> | Array<Date | null> | undefined | null
props.description: The default value for the input when not controlled by `modelValue`.

props.name: name
props.description: The name attribute for the element, typically used in form submissions.

props.name: selectionMode
props.description: Defines the quantity of the selection.

props.name: dateFormat
props.description: Format of the date. Defaults to PrimeVue Locale configuration.

props.name: updateModelType
props.description: Type of the value to write back to modelValue.

props.name: inline
props.description: When enabled, displays the datepicker as inline instead of an overlay.

props.name: showOtherMonths
props.description: Whether to display dates in other months (non-selectable) at the start or end of the current month. To make these days selectable use the selectOtherMonths option.

props.name: selectOtherMonths
props.description: Whether days in other months shown before or after the current month are selectable. This only applies if the showOtherMonths option is set to true.

props.name: showIcon
props.description: When enabled, displays a button with icon next to input.

props.name: iconDisplay
props.description: Icon position of the component. This only applies if the showIcon option is set to true.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon of the datepicker button.

props.name: prevIcon
props.description: Icon to show in the previous button.

props.name: nextIcon
props.description: Icon to show in the next button.

props.name: incrementIcon
props.description: Icon to show in each of the increment buttons.

props.name: decrementIcon
props.description: Icon to show in each of the decrement buttons.

props.name: numberOfMonths
props.description: Number of months to display.

props.name: responsiveOptions
props.description: An array of options for responsive design.

props.name: breakpoint
props.description: The breakpoint to define the maximum width boundary for datepicker panel.

props.name: view
props.description: Type of view to display.

props.name: minDate
props.description: The minimum selectable date.

props.name: maxDate
props.description: The maximum selectable date.

props.name: disabledDates
props.description: Array with dates to disable.

props.name: disabledDays
props.description: Array with disabled weekday numbers.

props.name: maxDateCount
props.description: Maximum number of selectable dates in multiple mode.

props.name: showOnFocus
props.description: When disabled, datepicker will not be visible with input focus.

props.name: autoZIndex
props.description: Whether to automatically manage layering.

props.name: baseZIndex
props.description: Base zIndex value to use in layering.

props.name: showButtonBar
props.description: Whether to display today and clear buttons at the footer.

props.name: shortYearCutoff
props.description: The cutoff year for determining the century for a date.

props.name: showTime
props.description: Whether to display timepicker.

props.name: timeOnly
props.description: Whether to display timepicker only.

props.name: hourFormat
props.description: Specifies hour format.

props.name: stepHour
props.description: Hours to change per step.

props.name: stepMinute
props.description: Minutes to change per step.

props.name: stepSecond
props.description: Seconds to change per step.

props.name: showSeconds
props.description: Whether to show the seconds in time picker.

props.name: hideOnDateTimeSelect
props.description: Whether to hide the overlay on date selection when showTime is enabled.

props.name: hideOnRangeSelection
props.description: Whether to hide the overlay on date selection is completed when selectionMode is range.

props.name: timeSeparator
props.description: Separator of time selector.

props.name: showWeek
props.description: When enabled, datepicker will show week numbers.

props.name: manualInput
props.description: Whether to allow entering the date manually via typing.

props.name: showClear
props.description: When enabled, a clear icon is displayed to clear the value.

props.name: size
props.description: Defines the size of the component.

props.name: invalid
props.description: When present, it specifies that the component should have invalid state style.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When present, it specifies that the component should be disabled.

props.name: variant
props.description: Specifies the input variant of the component.

props.name: readonly
props.description: When present, it specifies that an input field is read-only.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the input.

props.name: appendTo
props.description: A valid query selector or an HTMLElement to specify where the overlay gets attached.

props.name: inputId
props.description: Identifier of the underlying input element.

props.name: inputStyle
props.description: Inline style of the input field.

props.name: inputClass
props.description: Style class of the input field.

props.name: panelStyle
props.description: Inline style of the overlay panel.

props.name: panelClass
props.description: Style class of the overlay panel.

props.name: todayButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the ButtonProps to the today button component.

props.name: clearButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the ButtonProps to the clear button component.

props.name: navigatorButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the ButtonProps to the navigator button component.

props.name: timepickerButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the ButtonProps to the timepicker button component.

props.name: fluid
props.description: Spans 100% width of the container when enabled.

props.name: ariaLabelledby
props.description: Establishes relationships between the component and label(s) where its value should be one or more element IDs.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Establishes a string value that labels the component.

props.name: formControl
props.description: Form control object, typically used for handling validation and form state.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: update:modelValue
events.type: (value: Date | Array<Date> | Array<Date | null> | undefined | null): void

events.name: value-change
events.type: (value: Date | Array<Date> | Array<Date | null> | undefined | null): void
events.description: Emitted when the value changes in uncontrolled mode.

events.name: input
events.description: Callback to invoke when input field is being typed.

events.name: date-select
events.description: Callback to invoke when a date is selected.

events.name: show
events.description: Callback to invoke when datepicker panel is shown.

events.name: hide
events.description: Callback to invoke when datepicker panel is hidden.

events.name: today-click
events.description: Callback to invoke when today button is clicked.

events.name: clear-click
events.description: Callback to invoke when clear button is clicked.

events.name: month-change
events.description: Callback to invoke when a month is changed using the navigators.

events.name: year-change
events.description: Callback to invoke when a year is changed using the navigators.

events.name: focus
events.description: Callback to invoke on focus of input field.

events.name: blur
events.description: Callback to invoke on blur of input field.

events.name: keydown
events.description: Callback to invoke when a key is pressed.

slots.name: header
slots.type: (): VNode[]

slots.name: prevbutton
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Action function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ actionCallback: (event: Event) => void; /** * Keydown function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ keydownCallback: (event: Event) => void; }): VNode[]

slots.name: nextbutton
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Action function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ actionCallback: (event: Event) => void; /** * Keydown function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ keydownCallback: (event: Event) => void; }): VNode[]

slots.name: buttonbar
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Today click function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ todayCallback: (event: Event) => void; /** * Clear click function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ clearCallback: (event: Event) => void; }): VNode[]

slots.name: todaybutton
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Action function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ actionCallback: (event: Event) => void; /** * Keydown function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ keydownCallback: (event: Event) => void; }): VNode[]

slots.name: clearbutton
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Action function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ actionCallback: (event: Event) => void; /** * Keydown function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ keydownCallback: (event: Event) => void; }): VNode[]

slots.name: hourincrementbutton
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Event callbacks. */ callbacks: object; }): VNode[]

slots.name: hourdecrementbutton
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Event callbacks. */ callbacks: object; }): VNode[]

slots.name: minuteincrementbutton
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Event callbacks. */ callbacks: object; }): VNode[]

slots.name: minutedecrementbutton
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Event callbacks. */ callbacks: object; }): VNode[]

slots.name: secondincrementbutton
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Event callbacks. */ callbacks: object; }): VNode[]

slots.name: seconddecrementbutton
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Event callbacks. */ callbacks: object; }): VNode[]

slots.name: ampmincrementbutton
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Toggle function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ toggleCallback: (event: Event) => void; /** * Keydown function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ keydownCallback: (event: Event) => void; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom ampm toggle increment button template

slots.name: ampmdecrementbutton
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Toggle function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ toggleCallback: (event: Event) => void; /** * Keydown function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ keydownCallback: (event: Event) => void; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom ampm toggle decrement button template

slots.name: footer
slots.type: (): VNode[]

slots.name: date
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Value of the component. */ date: DatePickerDateSlotOptions; }): VNode[]

slots.name: decade
slots.type: (scope: { /** * An array containing the start and and year of a decade to display at header of the year picker. */ years: string[] | undefined; }): VNode[]

slots.name: weekheaderlabel
slots.type: (): VNode[]

slots.name: weeklabel
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Number of the week */ weekNumber: number; }): VNode[]

slots.name: dropdownicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the dropdown icon */ class: any; }): VNode[]

slots.name: inputicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the input icon */ class: any; /** * Click callback */ clickCallback: () => void; }): VNode[]

slots.name: previcon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the previous icon */ class: any; }): VNode[]

slots.name: nexticon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the next icon */ class: any; }): VNode[]

slots.name: incrementicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the increment icon */ class: any; }): VNode[]

slots.name: decrementicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the decrement icon */ class: any; }): VNode[]

slots.name: dropdownbutton
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Toggle function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ toggleCallback: (event: Event) => void; }): VNode[]

slots.name: clearicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Clear icon click function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ clearCallback: (event: Event) => void; }): VNode[]
